name: Death Rush
explicitMods: Gain Adrenaline for 3 seconds on Kill
flavourText: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends

name: Woe Shell
explicitMods: Enemies you Kill have a 35% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Physical Damage
3% increased Area of Effect per Endurance Charge
Gain 1 Endurance Charge every second if you've been Hit Recently

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the level of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +2 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: This spell creates ethereal blades which orbit in an area around you, dealing damage every 0.6 seconds to all enemies in their radius. As more blades are added, the damage becomes greater and more frequent.
explicitMods: 40% increased Hit Rate for each blade
Can have up to 10 active spinning blades
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage

Supported Spells gain a Seal every 0.64 seconds, to a maximum of 4 Seals
Supported Spells are Unsealed when cast, and their effects Reoccur for each Seal lost
Supported Skills deal 29% less Damage when Reoccurring

flavourText: "True power grows with patience. You must nurture it.
You learn what it needs. You provide. You wait. Only
then, when it is ripe, does it yield its fruits."

flavourText: Immortality could grant Catarina the time necessary to shape
a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

name: The Gull
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
77% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
54% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

flavourText: The Black Sekhema was a formidable fighter
alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.

name: Demon Band
explicitMods: Adds 6 to 12 Physical Damage to Attacks

name: Headhunter
implicitMods: +20% to Critical Strike Multiplier during any Flask Effect
explicitMods: 27% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Progenesis
explicitMods: When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: They were bred in a cosmic ocean of raw creation.
Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

implicitMods: 0.4% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life

explicitMods: 35% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
craftedMods: 25% of Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

flavourText: "He speaks, he leads, he stands tall...
yet, what has he truly done, save
spill our blood in pursuit of power?"

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. When you kill an enemy while you have this buff, this skill will summon a Sentinel of Purity, or refresh the duration and life of an existing one instead if you have the maximum number of them. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.
explicitMods: Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Kill an Enemy
20% chance to Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base Burning Damage is 30% of Overkill Damage
Buff grants 20% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
